hero.label: Made for Shaped
hero.headline: I want to sell the retrieval engine every product needs.
hero.subheadline: Shaped is solving one of the hardest problems in AI: making search and recommendations actually relevant in real time. As a BDR who built pipeline from zero at an AI startup, I know how to translate deeply technical products into conversations that close. I want to be the first voice prospects hear when they discover Shaped.

whyCompany.title: Real-time retrieval is the next infrastructure layer
whyCompany.body: Every product with a search bar or feed will need what Shaped builds. You're not competing for a feature; you're defining a category. That $8M Series A from Madrona and YC signals the market agrees. I want to be part of the team that makes 'Shaped-powered' the default.

whyCompany.title: First SDR hire means building the playbook
whyCompany.body: This isn't a role where someone hands you a script. At 25 people, Shaped needs someone who can test messaging, iterate on outreach channels, and figure out what resonates with engineering and product leaders. That's exactly what I did at Copygen.ai, building the entire outbound motion from scratch.

whyCompany.title: HubSpot, outbound sequences, and AI products are my wheelhouse
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai I ran cold outreach through HubSpot and LinkedIn, helping acquire 15-20 paying clients for an AI product. At NextAfter I learned how to optimize conversion through data-driven experimentation. Shaped's SDR role asks for exactly this combination: scrappy outbound plus analytical rigor.

quote: I've sold AI before most people understood what it could do. Shaped is building something every tech company will need. I want to be the one who helps them realize it.
